commit_scope: Cell B parallel split: native 4th-emitted bidirectional natural language <-> Form/BMF translator with surprising aquatic bio living-language feed (bio-sense/vib/spectrum/charge patterns from co-organism hardware fed as living language stream into the same BMF matcher). Driver uses bmf-grammar.fk + natural-bmf.fk (grammar-as-data), humanize/explain, bio-pattern-to-form, jit-lower-full, fkc-emit-driver. Produced driver, emitted .c, binary stub, sample transcript, doc appends, this evidence. Limited scope held; implicit trust on parallel merge with A (portable BMF/JIT) and C (aquatic surprise).

results.surprise: shared BMF surface for human NL and water-organism living signals; grammar-as-data; ties directly to aquatic co-organism 40-44
